zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Moulton於1450年出生在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓時，她的父親John Moulton35歲，母親Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland30歲。她於1484年與Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.在英國英格蘭史洛普爾希普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1559年在英國享年109歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Moulton于1450年出生在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓时，她的父亲John Moulton35岁，母亲Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland30岁。她于1484年与Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.在英国英格兰史洛普爾希普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1559年在英国享年109岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Moulton was born in 1450, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Moulton, was 35 and her mother, Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, was 30. She married Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. in 1484, in Shipton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1559, in England, at the age of 109.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Moulton est née en 1450, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Moulton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. en 1484, à Shipton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1559, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 109 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Moulton 1450 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Moulton 35 und ihre Mutter Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland 30. Sie hat 1484 in Shipton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1559 im Alter von 109 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Moulton è nata il nel 1450 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Moulton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. nel 1484, nel Shipton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1559, nel England, all'età di 109 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Moultonが1450年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた時，父John Moultonは35歳，母Agnes Elizabeth Swayveslandは30歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュイプトンでHumphrey Bulkeley Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1559年にイギリスで109歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Moulton(이)가 1450년 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Moulton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 시프턴에서 Humphrey Bulkeley Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 영국에서 109세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Moulton nasceu em 1450, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Moulton, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. em 1484, em Shipton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1559, em Inglaterra, com 109 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Moulton родилась в 1450 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Moulton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. в 1484 г. в местности шиптон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1559 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 109 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Moulton nació en 1450, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Moulton, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes Elizabeth Swayvesland, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Humphrey Bulkeley Esq. en 1484, en Shipton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1559, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 109 años.
